requirement_topic.en: IMDA Dealer Registration — Entity Licence for Importers and Distributors
requirement_topic.zh: IMDA经销商注册——进口商及分销商的主体牌照
requirement_topic.zht: IMDA經銷商登記——進口商及分銷商的主體牌照

summary.en: Entities (companies or individuals) that import, sell, offer for sale, or supply regulated telecommunications and radio communications equipment in Singapore must hold a valid IMDA Dealer Licence under the Telecommunications Act (Cap. 323) and Radio Communications Act (Cap. 270). This is a company-level licence separate from the product-level equipment registration. An overseas manufacturer without a Singapore entity must appoint a Singapore-registered dealer or authorised representative who holds the Dealer Licence and is responsible for compliance.
summary.zh: 在新加坡进口、销售、要约出售或供应受监管电信及无线电通信设备的主体（公司或个人），须依据《电信法》（第323章）及《无线电通信法》（第270章）持有有效的IMDA经销商牌照。这是独立于产品级设备注册的主体级牌照。无新加坡实体的境外制造商须委任持有经销商牌照、负责合规事务的新加坡注册经销商或授权代表。
summary.zht: 在新加坡進口、銷售、要約出售或供應受監管電信及無線電通訊設備的主體（公司或個人），須依據《電信法》（第323章）及《無線電通訊法》（第270章）持有有效的IMDA經銷商牌照。這是獨立於產品級設備登記的主體級牌照。無新加坡實體的境外製造商須委任持有經銷商牌照、負責合規事務的新加坡登記經銷商或授權代表。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications Act (Cap. 323) — Dealer Licensing Provisions, Singapore
Radio Communications Act (Cap. 270) — Dealer Licensing Provisions, Singapore

summary.en: In China, there is no exact equivalent mandatory company-level dealer licence for importing or selling wireless/telecom equipment domestically. Product-level approvals (SRRC, NAL, CCC) attach to the product, not the entity. Certain telecom value-added service providers require MIIT licences (e.g., ICP/ISP licences), but direct product dealing does not require a separate entity registration analogous to the IMDA Dealer Licence.
summary.zh: 在中国，进口或销售国内无线/电信设备并无完全对应的强制性主体级经销商牌照要求。产品级批准（SRRC、NAL、CCC）针对产品而非主体。部分电信增值服务提供商须持有工信部牌照（如ICP/ISP许可证），但直接产品经销并不需要类似IMDA经销商牌照的独立主体注册。
summary.zht: 在中國，進口或銷售國內無線/電信設備並無完全對應的強制性主體級經銷商牌照要求。產品級批准（SRRC、NAL、CCC）針對產品而非主體。部分電信增值服務提供商須持有工信部牌照（如ICP/ISP許可證），但直接產品經銷並不需要類似IMDA經銷商牌照的獨立主體登記。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Telecom Value-Added Service Licence (ICP/ISP) — for service providers, China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — product-level, China

gap.en: Singapore requires a company-level IMDA Dealer Licence in addition to product-level equipment registration. A Chinese exporter without a Singapore legal entity must appoint a Singapore-based licensed dealer or distributor as the responsible party before any equipment can be imported or sold. This entity-level requirement has no direct parallel in China's domestic product approval system.
gap.zh: 新加坡在产品级设备注册之外，还要求主体级IMDA经销商牌照。无新加坡法律实体的中国出口商，在进口或销售任何设备前，须委任一家持牌的新加坡经销商或分销商作为责任方。这一主体级要求与中国国内产品批准体系无直接对应。
gap.zht: 新加坡在產品級設備登記之外，還要求主體級IMDA經銷商牌照。無新加坡法律實體的中國出口商，在進口或銷售任何設備前，須委任一家持牌的新加坡經銷商或分銷商作為責任方。此主體級要求與中國國內產品批准體系無直接對應。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The IMDA Dealer Licence is a mandatory company-level requirement for any entity importing or selling regulated telecommunications or radio equipment in Singapore. A Chinese manufacturer without a Singapore entity must engage a Singapore-registered licensed dealer before shipment. This is a separate obligation from product-level IMDA equipment registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IMDA经销商牌照是任何在新加坡进口或销售受监管电信或无线电设备的主体须承担的强制主体级要求。无新加坡实体的中国制造商在发货前须委任一家新加坡注册持牌经销商。这是独立于产品级IMDA设备注册的另一项义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IMDA經銷商牌照是任何在新加坡進口或銷售受監管電信或無線電設備的主體須承擔的強制主體級要求。無新加坡實體的中國製造商在發貨前須委任一家新加坡登記持牌經銷商。這是獨立於產品級IMDA設備登記的另一項義務。
